Will Bitcoin dip to $55,000 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly ONE paragraph, start with 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret sentiment: Data shows mixed: Ethereum dip to $1500 by Dec 2026: Yes 39% (so 39% think it will dip). Bitcoin up/down on July 23: Yes 20% (meaning "Yes" to up? ambiguous). But "Will the price of Bitcoin be above $64,000 on July 23?: Yes 96%" indicates strong bullish expectation for >64k. "Will Bitcoin dip to $62,500 in July?: Yes 40%" moderate dip expectation. "Will Bitcoin reach $72,500 in July?: Yes 7%" low chance. "Will Bitcoin reach $70,000 in July?: Yes 20%" low. "Will Bitcoin dip to $55,000 by Dec 31, 2026?: Yes 42%". So overall: strong belief Bitcoin >64k on July 23, but also notable chance of dip to 62.5k and 55k longer term. Mixed sentiment.

Thus start with "Mixed:" then reasons with numbers.

Word count max

We need to decide overall sentiment based on data: There are bullish (Bitcoin ETFs approach $1B in 7-session inflow run). Bearish: Bitcoin/Ethereum-linked protocols lose $35M in multiple attacks; Kakao taps Circle to explore won stablecoin payment infrastructure (Bearish). Neutral items: many. So we have both bullish and bearish signals. Likely Mixed.
